## OM Phase-1 — Phase-8 Delivery Reconciliation Report

Release: **feature/SBE-1125** (7 admin Order-Management stories: 24.6/24.7/24.8/24.9/24.10/24.11/24.15), merged to `dev`. All 5 repos audited at dev tip = the full merged artifact.

> **POST-AUDIT RULINGS & STATUS (2026-07-05, Prantik):**
> - **P1 — RULED NET.** Confluence + story-doc cross-check confirmed 24.6 is the only story specifying a refund-aware balance; 24.7/24.8 are silent and 24.1 mandates a "centralized billing service" balance → **24.6 is authoritative → `balance_due` = net everywhere.** Fix = align the 3 gross surfaces (24.7 payments, 24.8 plan-GET, order list) to `deriveNetPaid`, bundled with P3+P4 on one admin fix branch (branch cut pending authorization). Also revisit the 24.7 `payment_status` label (gross → net).
> - **P2 — DONE (doc).** billing_email-only recorded as intended in the plan P-D7 note + ledger U19-adjacent (spec-compliant, no code change).
> - **P5 — DONE (doc).** Ledger U1/U12/U3 reconciled to the delivered surface (refund-options + `orders.refund.read`; `payment-plan.create`; net-balance canonical).
> - **P3, P4 — pending** on the admin fix branch (Swagger wording; seeder URL snake_case).

---

### 1. Headline verdict

**The release is delivered fully against plan.** Of **68** plan-time Deliverable+Partial requirements across all 7 stories:

| Outcome | Count |
|---|---|
| Verified-delivered | **65** |
| Drifted (doc-only, benign) | **1** |
| Partial-as-planned | **2** |
| **Lost / unexplained drift** | **0** |

The 68 = 65 verified + 1 drift (24.10-c) + 2 partial-as-planned (24.9-f Stripe-detection half; 24.8-l milestone-label display half). **Every plan-time Deliverable is either verified-delivered or captured as an approved/known item.** No requirement was silently lost, no OOS/Blocked/NotDeliverable/Deferred/BA-parked row leaked into the release, and `Order.notes` (the reserved exhibitor idempotency store) is provably never selected by any order-details/payments/plan/refund/cancel/notification response. The only substantive open item is a P1 **cross-view balance_due inconsistency** (24.7 payments view reports gross, 24.6 detail reports net) that the Confluence cross-check confirms is **not a spec violation** — a consistency fix, not a lost requirement.

---

### 2. Per-story reconciliation table

| Story | Ticket | Deliv+Partial | Verified | Drifted | Lost | Verify status | Notes |
|---|---|---|---|---|---|---|---|
| **24.9** Refund Management | SBE-1133 | 8 | 7 | 0 | 0 | ran, concurs | 24.9-f partial-as-planned (Stripe-detection shipped; manual-only-for-offline half correctly absent — no offline producer yet). Real Stripe money path + idempotent vs charge.refunded webhook. |
| **24.10** Order Cancellation | SBE-1134 | 10 | 9 | 1 | 0 | ran, concurs | 24.10-c = benign shipped-Swagger drift (DTO text says processing→canceled; code cancels scheduled+failed only, 409-blocks processing). Two-phase confirm, PT cascade, U5 inventory release all correct. |
| **24.11** Cancel/Refund Email | SBE-1135 | 5 | 5 | 0 | 0 | ran, concurs | One-email-per-action verified across all flag/refund combos; self-seeded slugs; no Order.notes leak. |
| **24.8** Payment Plan Mgmt | SBE-1132 | 13 | 12 | 0 | 0 | ran, concurs | 24.8-l partial-as-planned: milestone label map delivered CORRECT at dev tip. | **24.7** Manual Payments / Payments View | SBE-1131 | 2 | 2 | 0 | 0 | ran, concurs | Both in-scope rows delivered. Note: story-level trace+verify declared 24.7 spotless but the U3 shared-unit pass caught its gross balance_due (see §5 P1). |

**Verifier vs auditor reconciliation:** All 7 verify agents ran (none reported "VERIFY AGENT FAILED"). Every verifier independently reproduced the auditor's trace at the cited file/line and **concurred with zero disputes and zero independently-confirmed lost/drifted rows.** The single drift (24.10-c) is confirmed by both. No verifier finding overturned an auditor verdict.

### 3. Shared-unit conformance (20-unit ledger)

| Unit | Name | Conformance |
|---|---|---|
| U1 | Refund primitive + ledger (refund_failed, orders.refund, caps) | ✅ conforms |
| U2 | Amount-aware charge.refunded webhook (external-api) | ✅ conforms |
| **U3** | **paid_amount stays GROSS; net = gross − ledger** | ⚠️ **deviates** |
| U4 | Cancel endpoint + PT cascade (scheduled→canceled, next_retry_at:null) | ✅ conforms |
| U5 | Inventory releaseForOrder on cancel | ✅ conforms |
| U6 | Cancel/refund email pair (self-seeded, one-email-per-action) | ✅ conforms |
| **U7** | **payment_type on PaymentTransaction (backfill NOT NULL no default)** | ⚠️ **deviates (benign)** |
| U8 | payment_memo on PaymentTransaction (distinct from Order.payment_memo) | ✅ conforms |
| U9 | Worker cron guards (charge/retry = credit_card; reminder = disjoint complement) | ✅ conforms |
| **U10** | **C13 mapper + D1 MILESTONE_STATUS_LABELS** | ✅ **conforms** |
| U11 | Installment PATCH (Mark Paid/Unpaid, manual-only) | ✅ conforms |
| U12 | Plan-level CRUD + locks | ✅ conforms |
| U13 | GET /orders/:id/payments (24.7) | ✅ conforms |
| U14 | GET /orders/:id detail aggregate — Order.notes never selected | ✅ conforms |
| U15 | PATCH /orders/:id status-gate matrix | ✅ conforms |
| U16 | PATCH /orders/:id/sales-rep, NO HubSpot | ✅ conforms |
| U17 | Per-installment VOID (snake_case :transaction_id) | ✅ conforms |
| U18 | Order.additional_emails (Json) | ✅ conforms |
| U19 | Reminder cron + templates + settings | ✅ conforms |
| **U20** | **Status-display derivations — all pure reads** | ✅ **conforms** |

**U10 (label map) — the audit's headline drift class — CONFORMS at dev tip.** The single shared `MILESTONE_STATUS_LABELS` (admin `orders.helpers.ts:444-452`) maps `scheduled→Unpaid, succeeded→Paid, failed→CC Failed, canceled→Voided, refunded→Refunded` verbatim to the Order-Status sheet, with `processing→Processing` and `refund_failed→Refund Failed` sanctioned for the two statuses without a sheet row. A repo-wide grep found **zero inline enum-literal displays** and no competing map in the other 4 repos — single source of truth confirmed. The 2026-07-04 relabel fix (which rescued the historical 24.8/24.7 drift) is present. Every consumer (U11/U13/U14/U17) routes through this one mapper.

**U20 (derivations) — all pure reads, CONFORMS.** `deriveOrderStatusDisplay` (six D1 labels verbatim), `deriveOrderSource` (D3 chain), `deriveOrderPaymentStatus` (exhibitor branch order), and `deriveIsOverdue` are all pure functions with **no persisted derived column**. 24.15 mirrors overdue semantics as native inline predicate (no cross-repo duplication).

**Two deviations:**
- **U3 (real, open):** the 24.7 payments summary exposes GROSS `balance_due` and never loads the refund ledger, while 24.6 detail NETS. Cross-view inconsistency for refunded orders — see §5 P1. The completeness critic extends this: the 24.8 payment-plan GET (`order-payment-plan.service.ts:211`) and the order list (`orders.service.ts:182`) are **also** gross, so 24.6 is the *only* netting surface. Any ruling must cover all gross surfaces.
- **U7 (benign):** ledger predicted "5 writer updates"; code ships **7** card-writer sites (admin 1 + exhibitor 4 + external 2) all setting `payment_type: credit_card`. This is the SAFE direction — a required superset given the NOT-NULL/no-default column — so the ledger simply under-counted. Migration, comments, and schema doc-comments all conform exactly.

---

### 4. Scope-creep & verdict-flips

**Uncontrolled scope: essentially none.** Every route, permission key, schema column/enum/model, trigger slug, and template traces to a ledger unit or an allowed rider. All 4 sanctioned cross-repo riders present and ledger-authorized (exhibitor SETTLED-set += refund_failed; external keep-canceled + amount-aware webhook; U5 inventory release; U18 additional_emails).

**Off-ledger surface (one, plan-backed):** `GET /orders/:id/refund-options` + `orders.refund.read` (24.9) — absent from ledger U1 and the permission table, but backed by 24.9 story-doc ACs 24.9-d/f. Legitimate same-owner read plumbing; ledger-hygiene gap already recorded. Also `orders.payment-plan.create` is on-ledger via U12/wildcard but omitted from the ledger's literal "read/update/delete" enumeration.

**Verdict-flips: zero silent flips.** The only OOS row that shipped — 24.12 inventory release (U5) — carries an explicit recorded ledger decision ("absorbed from OOS 24.12 as integrity invariant"). Every other OOS/Blocked/NotDeliverable/Deferred/BA-parked row was **honored, none delivered**: QuickBooks refund/sync + force-sync (24.9-i, 24.8-l-QB, 24.6-w) — no QB code anywhere; chargeback trio (24.8-l ND) — no dispute states, no charge.dispute handler; HubSpot deal-sync (24.6-v/x) — sales-rep PATCH explicitly carries no HubSpot side-effect; Send Order Email (24.6-r) and per-item Company Contact (24.6-l2) — no routes/joins. **Inverse check passed:** the recorded 24.7-D3 drop of order-level `PATCH :id/payment-status` was genuinely dropped (Mark-Paid/Unpaid lives only in 24.8's installment PATCH; payment_status survives as a derived read label only).

---

### 5. Prioritized fix list

**P1 — align 24.7 payments balance to NET (cross-view consistency).** 24.7 payments view returns gross `balance_due`; 24.6 detail returns net. Confluence 3859742741 confirms 24.7's spec defines **no** order-balance/net-gross rule, so this is NOT a spec violation — but it contradicts the one spec-defined balance (24.6 "Balance Payable / Total Payable"). Fix: one BA/architect ruling on canonical balance semantics, then align 24.7 to `deriveNetPaid`, **and apply the same decision to the 24.8 payment-plan GET (line 211) and order list (line 182)** so the fix does not leave a second 24.6-vs-24.8 inconsistency. Small code change.

**P2 — reminders billing_email-only is spec-compliant → DOC-ONLY.** 24.15 resolves recipient by billing_email only (no company-primary fallback). Confluence says reminders go "to customers" and mandates no chain; the U6 chain is our own design. Fix: record billing_email-only as intended in the 24.15 plan note. Porting the U6 fallback is optional consistency, not spec-required. **Downgraded to doc-only.**

**P3 — three documentation/hygiene items:**
- **24.10-c Swagger drift:** `order-cancel.dto.ts:218` and `:107` still advertise `processing→canceled`; code cancels scheduled+failed only and 409-blocks processing. One-line DTO description fix.
- **U11 seeder camelCase URL:** the installment-PATCH permission seed row stores the route URL as `:installmentId` while the delivered param is snake_case `:installment_id`. Cosmetic; matching is by permission key. Align the stored URL string.
- **Ledger refund-options hygiene:** add `GET :id/refund-options` + `orders.refund.read` to ledger U1, and `orders.payment-plan.create` to the U12 permission enumeration.

*No P1 code defects, no correctness/security findings, no lost requirements. The single P1 is a consistency alignment, not a bug.*

---

### 6. Residual known-items (already logged — accepted, not new losses)

- **SCH/OQ-1 reminder dedupe granularity:** dedupe is order/email+slug-level, not strict per-installment (`notification_logs` has no PT column). Documented limitation, not a defect.
- **24.10 cascade "Voided"/processing wording:** the cancel cascade deliberately excludes `processing` (409-blocks it) to prevent charge-after-cancel; Confluence AC honored at success time. Doc amendment tracked under P3.
- **U10 intra-release label drift (rescued pre-merge):** 24.8's commit 81f6fd9 shipped the milestone map drifted; sibling 24.6 commit 4c3308c corrected it before merge. Delivered artifact is correct — a valid process/gate-escape observation, **not** a delivered defect.
- **U16 / OQ-5 HubSpot deal-owner sync on reassign:** parked by design; PATCH :id/sales-rep explicitly has no HubSpot side-effect.
- **Admin-checkout billing snapshot write-gap (OQ-1):** correctly left to the Cart team, not addressed here.

---

### 7. Audit-integrity note

The **first synthesis pass dropped story 24.6** from the report due to a pipeline-null on its verify stage (its verify payload contained malformed trailing JSON around the `story` field, which nulled the record downstream). **This pass includes all 7 stories, with 24.6's full trace recovered** and its verify `net_assessment` (present and thorough — 22/22 rows independently reproduced, no disputes) folded back in. All 7 verify agents ran; none emitted "VERIFY AGENT FAILED", so no story rests on trace + shared-unit corroboration alone. The grand-total arithmetic (68 = 65 + 1 drift + 2 partial-as-planned) reconciles exactly with the seven per-story counts.

---

### 8. Final reconciliation statement

**OM Phase-1 is reconciled as fully delivered against plan.** All 65 verified requirements trace 1:1 to concrete merged artifacts; the 2 partial rows are partial-as-planned (deferred halves correctly absent); the 1 drift is benign doc-only text. Eighteen of twenty shared units conform exactly; U7's deviation is a safe superset and U10/U20 — the drift classes this audit exists to catch — are clean at dev tip. Scope is controlled with zero silent flips, and `Order.notes` is never exposed. **Zero requirements are lost and zero spec-mandated behavior is wrong or missing.** The release can be called complete, with the P1 balance-semantics alignment (24.7/24.8/list) as the sole substantive follow-up — a consistency fix requiring one BA/architect ruling, not a delivery gap.
